title: Refactor GEP ERP Components
why: Files were exceeding the 200 line limit and becoming difficult to maintain
root_cause: Accumulated technical debt and inline state/JSX
solution: Extracted Modals, Tables, and State logic into dedicated sub-components and hooks
prevention: Enforce strict 200-line limits and Component-based architecture
rollback_strategy: Git revert the UI refactor commits if regression is found
